title: tagetes sororia
intro: Tagetes sororia, also known as the Mexican marigold or signet marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes sororia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
